raw_consumer_statement: " I disputed a charge of {$820.00} from XXXX on my Barclays Aviator Mastercard ( Case ID XXXX ) for a rental car service that was never delivered. The company does not operate at XXXX XXXX XXXX where the rental was to occur. I contacted Barclays within minutes of the charge posting and followed all instructions. Despite this, Barclays closed the case twicewithout giving me a chance to submit evidence, without written notice, and despite representatives telling me the case was still under investigation. They claim they called me twice but left no voicemail. I am now being repeatedly transferred by phone with no resolution. ''
